headline: Nimbus Cloud beats Q1 estimates on AI cloud demand
summary: Nimbus Cloud Holdings reported Q1 revenue up 38% YoY, citing accelerating GenAI infrastructure spend by enterprise customers. Raised FY guidance.

headline: Quartzite Semi unveils next-gen training accelerator
summary: Quartzite Semiconductors announced its 'QX-9' family of training accelerators with sampling in H2. Customers include three hyperscalers per company release.

headline: Zenith Robotics raises capex outlook, sees humanoid pull-through
summary: Zenith Robotics raised 2026 capex guidance by 22% to support new humanoid line. Order book extended through 2027.

headline: Telara Networks signs multi-year cloud interconnect deal
summary: Telara Networks announced a five-year frame agreement with a top-three cloud provider, valued at $1.2B over the life of the contract.

headline: Meridian Pacific Bancorp posts Q1 deposit outflows of $4.2B
summary: Meridian Pacific Bancorp disclosed $4.2B in Q1 deposit outflows. Management guided to higher provisioning. Shares fell 14% in after-hours.

headline: Rating agency places Meridian Pacific on watch negative
summary: A major rating agency placed Meridian Pacific Bancorp's BBB- senior debt on watch for downgrade citing deposit concentration and CRE exposure.

headline: Regional bank sector ETF off 6% as deposit concerns spread
summary: Regional bank shares broadly lower on contagion fears from Meridian Pacific.

headline: Eldoria Bank issues reassuring Q1 trading update
summary: Eldoria Bank Holdings released an interim update affirming deposit stability and Q1 NIM in line with prior guidance.

headline: CPI hotter than expected at 3.6% YoY, core sticky at 3.9%
summary: Headline CPI printed at 3.6% YoY versus 3.4% consensus. Core services ex-housing remained sticky. Markets repriced terminal rate higher.

headline: Central bank minutes emphasize patience on cuts
summary: Minutes from the most recent meeting struck a hawkish tone, with members emphasizing the need to see further disinflation before easing.

headline: Treasury announces larger-than-expected refunding
summary: Treasury announced refunding sizes for 10s and 30s above market expectations, putting pressure on the long end.

headline: Brightgate Energy in talks to acquire North Atlas assets — report
summary: Press report citing unnamed sources says Brightgate Energy is in advanced discussions to acquire North Atlas Energy's upstream assets in the Permian.

headline: Brightgate CEO neither confirms nor denies North Atlas talks
summary: Asked on the earnings call, Brightgate's CEO declined to comment on M&A but highlighted the company's appetite for scale in core basins.

headline: North Atlas board hires advisors for strategic review
summary: North Atlas Energy disclosed it has retained advisors to evaluate strategic alternatives.

headline: Karmania reaches preliminary IMF staff-level agreement
summary: Republic of Karmania announced a preliminary staff-level agreement on a $4B EFF program, conditional on fiscal milestones.

headline: Karmania finance minister reaffirms commitment to reforms
summary: Speaking at a regional forum, Karmania's finance minister reiterated the government's commitment to subsidy reform and tax base expansion.

headline: Solterra Renewables green bond oversubscribed at issuance follow-on
summary: Solterra Renewables priced a tap of its 2035 green bond. Order book reached 3.5x cover; pricing tightened 12bps from initial guidance.

headline: Insurance industry ESG mandates ramp into Q2
summary: Industry survey shows 64% of insurance mandates now have explicit ESG sleeves, up from 41% a year ago.

headline: Velder Industries misses Q1, cuts FY guidance
summary: Velder Industries reported Q1 EBITDA below consensus and trimmed FY guidance by ~8%. Cited softness in European auto OEM volumes.

headline: Veridate Auto warns on European demand
summary: Veridate Auto Plc issued a profit warning citing weaker than expected European demand and inventory build at dealerships.

headline: Industrial metals lower on weaker China data
summary: Industrial metals lower across the board after China factory PMI undershot consensus.

headline: Helix Therapeutics reports positive Phase 3 readout
summary: Helix Therapeutics reported statistically significant Phase 3 results for its lead oncology candidate. Shares up 9% in pre-market.

headline: Ravenglass Pharma's lead candidate hits trial endpoint
summary: Ravenglass Pharma announced its anti-inflammatory candidate met its primary endpoint in a Phase 2b study.

headline: Keppra Defense wins multi-billion contract for next-gen missile system
summary: Keppra Defense Systems was awarded a $7.8B contract for the development and production of a next-generation precision-strike system.

headline: Investment-grade primary market sees record May issuance
summary: IG primary market issuance through May tracking 14% above prior-year levels.

headline: Nimbus Cloud taps the bond market for $3B
summary: Nimbus Cloud priced a 7-year deal at T+135, inside initial guidance of T+155.

headline: Covemark Foods reports inline Q1; modest price/mix tailwind
summary: Covemark Foods Q1 EPS in line with consensus. Pricing actions continue to offset volume softness.

headline: Magnetar Logistics raises 2026 outlook on freight recovery
summary: Magnetar Logistics raised its FY revenue outlook citing improving freight rates and contract renewals.

headline: Harpoon Media reports subscriber miss; ad market softens
summary: Harpoon Media Group reported a Q1 subscriber miss and softer ad market.

headline: Global PMI broadly softer; services holding up
summary: Composite PMIs softened across major economies; services sub-indices remained in expansionary territory.
